metadata.title: BufferLine | See how AI changes the way you think, decide, and trust
metadata.description: BufferLine builds cognitive infrastructure for human-AI judgment delegation. Observation, extraction, and authority architecture made visible.
metadata.ogTitle: BufferLine | AI changes how you think, decide, and trust. Can you see it?
metadata.ogDescription: Cognitive infrastructure for understanding how human judgment moves in AI interaction. It does not score delegation as good or bad; it makes movement visible.

brand.description: Cognitive infrastructure for understanding how AI changes judgment, delegation, and authority flow.
brand.note: Protocol-first today. Platform and product layers follow when evidence is strong.

footer.tagline: See how AI changes the way you think, decide, and trust.
